user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Northwind Traders.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-07 16:01 EST
Subject: URGENT: partner engagement Issue at Northwind Traders

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 17:54 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with partner engagement. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-08 17:23 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with partner engagement. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-03-26
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Michelle (Northwind Traders)

[00:01:15] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is partner engagement.

[00:05:00] Michelle (Northwind Traders): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:10:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:12:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:14:00] Michelle (Northwind Traders): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:18:00] Michelle (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:21:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] Michelle (Northwind Traders): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:27:00] Michelle (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.
